disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A heart sound was newly detected at a routine school screening today in an otherwise well child
trigger_question_examples: What did the school nurse actually say?
How did you come to hear about the heart sound?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: At his school medical today the nurse listened to his chest and said she could hear a whooshing or murmur sound, and suggested we get it checked.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The child is completely asymptomatic with normal exercise tolerance — no exertional breathlessness, chest pain or syncope
trigger_question_examples: Does he ever get puffed, chest pain or dizzy when he runs around?
Can he keep up with other kids at sport?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — he plays competitive soccer and keeps up with everyone. He never gets short of breath, chest pain or dizzy, and he has never fainted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No history of cyanosis, clubbing or breathing difficulty in infancy, and no frequent chest infections
trigger_question_examples: As a baby, did he ever go blue, feed poorly or get breathless?
Has he had a lot of chest infections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — he was a healthy baby, fed well, never went blue, and hasn't had lots of chest infections.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Normal growth and development in a thriving, active school-aged child
trigger_question_examples: How has his growth and development been?
Is he generally a healthy, active child?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's grown normally and hit all his milestones — he's a thriving, active kid.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe parental anxiety with a stated intention to present to the emergency department overnight for fear of sudden death
trigger_question_examples: What are you most worried might happen?
What were you hoping we could do tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm terrified his heart will just stop while he sleeps. I don't think I can wait — I'm thinking of taking him to the emergency department tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No family history of inherited cardiac conditions or sudden cardiac death
trigger_question_examples: Is there any family history of heart problems or unexplained sudden death?
Has anyone in the family needed heart surgery as a child?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there's nothing like that in the family that we know of.
